$comment: DEPRECATED — planering är en regel (plan-lifecycle.mdc), inte ett schema. Raderas i grandmaster-område 8.
title: Sajtmaskin Plan File Frontmatter
description: YAML frontmatter contract for docs/plans/active/P*.md. Mirrors the plan lifecycle guidance and the historical P27 validator contract; no automated runner is wired today.

id.description: Plan id, e.g. P21 or P27-validator. Must be unique across docs/plans/active/.

wave.description: Execution wave. Plans in the same wave are parallel-safe (no shared owner_files). Higher waves run after lower waves complete.

parallel_safe_with.description: Explicit allow-list of sibling plans this plan can run concurrently with. Cross-checked against owner_files by P27-validator.

blocked_by.description: Plans that must reach status=done before this plan starts.

owner_files.description: Repo-relative paths this plan EXCLUSIVELY writes to. Two plans in the same wave MUST NOT share an entry here.

read_only_files.description: Files the plan reads but does not modify. May overlap with other plans.

validator_hooks.description: Machine-checkable assertions P27-validator runs after this plan reports status=done.
